title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six Claude skills for improving project output: web scraping, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for compounding gains, ask-the-board for advisor consultation, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The method is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
